allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(s\);console.log\('counts:',JSON.stringify\(j.counts\)\);console.log\('running:',\(j.running||[]\).map\(r=>r.issue_identifier+' ['+r.status+']'\).join\(', '\)||'none'\);console.log\('paused:',\(j.paused||[]\).map\(r=>r.issue_identifier+' ['+r.paused_reason+']'\).join\(', '\)||'none'\);console.log\('retrying:',\(j.retrying||[]\).map\(r=>r.issue_identifier+' attempt#'+r.attempt+' '+\(r.error||''\)\).join\(' | '\)||'none'\);const m=\(j.running||[]\).find\(r=>/#65$/.test\(r.issue_identifier\)\);if\(m\){console.log\('\\\\n--- #65 running detail ---'\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(m,null,1\)\);}}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse error / not running:',e.message\);console.log\(s.slice\(0,400\)\);}}\)")
